Package microui.layout

Interface LayoutParams

All Known Implementing Classes:
ColumnLayoutParams, GridLayoutParams, LinearAxisLayoutParams, LinearLayoutParams, RowLayoutParams
public interface LayoutParams
Marker interface for layout parameters.

This interface serves as a base for layout-specific parameter classes. Implementations should define parameters that control how components are positioned and sized within different layout managers.

Classes implementing this interface are typically used to pass layout configuration data from components to layout managers.
